'''鈭歝h-l-v''' ('''chalava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:narc|narc]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:narc|narc]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-l-v
|-
! Lemma
| chalava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chalavithi|chalavithi]] || [[word:chalaviji|chalaviji]] || [[word:chalavishi|chalavishi]] || [[word:chalavi|chalavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chalavuthuth|chalavuthuth]] || [[word:chalavujuj|chalavujuj]] || [[word:chalavushush|chalavushush]] || [[word:chalav|chalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chalavuthu|chalavuthu]] || [[word:chalavuju|chalavuju]] || [[word:chalavushu|chalavushu]] || [[word:chalavu|chalavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chalavufuth|chalavufuth]] || [[word:chalavufuj|chalavufuj]] || [[word:chalavufush|chalavufush]] || [[word:chalavuf|chalavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chalavethe|chalavethe]] || [[word:chalaveje|chalaveje]] || [[word:chalaveshe|chalaveshe]] || [[word:chalave|chalave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chalavothoth|chalavothoth]] || [[word:chalavojoj|chalavojoj]] || [[word:chalavoshosh|chalavoshosh]] || [[word:chalav|chalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chalavotho|chalavotho]] || [[word:chalavojo|chalavojo]] || [[word:chalavosho|chalavosho]] || [[word:chalavo|chalavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chalavofoth|chalavofoth]] || [[word:chalavofoj|chalavofoj]] || [[word:chalavofosh|chalavofosh]] || [[word:chalavof|chalavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chalav忙th忙|chalav忙th忙]] || [[word:chalav忙j忙|chalav忙j忙]] || [[word:chalav忙sh忙|chalav忙sh忙]] || [[word:chalav忙|chalav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chalavathath|chalavathath]] || [[word:chalavajaj|chalavajaj]] || [[word:chalavashash|chalavashash]] || [[word:chalav|chalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chalavatha|chalavatha]] || [[word:chalavaja|chalavaja]] || [[word:chalavasha|chalavasha]] || [[word:chalava|chalava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chalavafath|chalavafath]] || [[word:chalavafaj|chalavafaj]] || [[word:chalavafash|chalavafash]] || [[word:chalavaf|chalavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chalavasha|chalavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochalavasha|gochalavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichalavasha|gokichalavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chalavn眉sha|chalavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochalavnkn眉sha|gochalavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichalavn眉sha|gokichalavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chalavsh毛sha|chalavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochalavnksh毛sha|gochalavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichalavsh毛sha|gokichalavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chalavrosha|chalavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochalavnkrosha|gochalavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichalavrosha|gokichalavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chalavmusha|chalavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochalavnkmusha|gochalavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichalavmusha|gokichalavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chalavsherasha|chalavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochalavnksherasha|gochalavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichalavsherasha|gokichalavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chalavngasha|chalavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochalavnkngasha|gochalavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichalavngasha|gokichalavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chalavyasha|chalavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochalavnkyasha|gochalavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichalavyasha|gokichalavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chalavyamasha|chalavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochalavnkyamasha|gochalavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichalavyamasha|gokichalavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chalavn眉sh毛sha|chalavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochalavnkn眉sh毛sha|gochalavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichalavn眉sh毛sha|gokichalavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chalavn眉rosha|chalavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochalavnkn眉rosha|gochalavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichalavn眉rosha|gokichalavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chalavn眉musha|chalavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochalavnkn眉musha|gochalavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichalavn眉musha|gokichalavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chalavsh毛n眉sha|chalavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochalavnksh毛n眉sha|gochalavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichalavsh毛n眉sha|gokichalavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chalavsh毛rosha|chalavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochalavnksh毛rosha|gochalavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichalavsh毛rosha|gokichalavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chalavsh毛musha|chalavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochalavnksh毛musha|gochalavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichalavsh毛musha|gokichalavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chalavron眉sha|chalavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochalavnkron眉sha|gochalavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichalavron眉sha|gokichalavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chalavrosh毛sha|chalavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochalavnkrosh毛sha|gochalavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichalavrosh毛sha|gokichalavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chalavromusha|chalavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochalavnkromusha|gochalavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichalavromusha|gokichalavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chalavmun眉sha|chalavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochalavnkmun眉sha|gochalavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichalavmun眉sha|gokichalavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chalavmush毛sha|chalavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochalavnkmush毛sha|gochalavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichalavmush毛sha|gokichalavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chalavmurosha|chalavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochalavnkmurosha|gochalavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichalavmurosha|gokichalavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chalav|chalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙l忙v|ch忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochalav|hochalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙l忙v|hoch忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochalav|hohochalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙l忙v|hohoch忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chalav|n眉chalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙l忙v|n眉ch忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chalav|n眉n眉chalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙l忙v|n眉n眉ch忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chalav|n茂chalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙l忙v|n茂ch忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chalav|n茂n茂chalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙l忙v|n茂n茂ch忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchalav|luchalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙l忙v|luch忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchalav|luluchalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙l忙v|luluch忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichalav|lichalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙l忙v|lich忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichalav|lilichalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙l忙v|lilich忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochalav|kochalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙l忙v|koch忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochalav|kokochalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙l忙v|kokoch忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechalav|kechalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙l忙v|kech忙l忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechalav|kekechalav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙l忙v|kekech忙l忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
